title: calophyllum rugosum
intro: Calophyllum rugosum, also known as the "Rough-barked Calophyllum," is a species of plant native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Calophyllum rugosum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and preventing the growth of certain microorganisms. Calophyllum rugosum can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as extracts, oils, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
